title: 1 step DFU - Content of the Software Update tab when there is update available only for Charge Case
scenario: Software Update tab shows earbuds as up to date and Charge Case with version, release notes, and Update button when firmware update is available only for the Charge Case
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure a Bluetooth audio device (earbuds + charge case) is connected.
Observe the Software Update tab content when a firmware update is available only for the Charge Case (CC).
expected: The earbuds are marked as "Up to date". The Charge Case displays the current firmware version, the available firmware version, release notes, and an "Update" button.
